Our Story
Every pair is born from
a craftsman's hands and
a designer's vision.

A journey from Istanbul to the world since 2012. La Bellini and Flamingo City offer more than shoes — a wearable philosophy of elegance. Natural materials, season-free designs and ergonomics that put comfort first.

Est. 2012 — Istanbul
